title: Maybank American Express Cash Back Gold Credit Card
cbcb_name: Maybank American Express Cash Back Gold Credit Card
cb_notes: Unlimited Cash Back with no minimum spend and no rebate cap. 1% Cash Back on local spend. 1.5% Cash Back on overseas spend. Excluded Utilites and eWallet.

title: Maybank FC Barcelona Visa Signature Card
cbcb_name: Maybank FC Barcelona Visa Signature Card
cb_notes: 1% Cash Back for all purchases (except for government bodies, utilities and e-wallet reloads) all year-long; capped at maximum of RM50 per month.

title: Maybank 2 Platinum Cards (AMEX)
cb_notes:
Earn 5% Cash Back when you spend with your Maybank 2 American Express Card during weekends in local and overseas; excluding transactions for utilities.
Cash Back is capped at RM50 per Principal Cardmember per calendar month.

title: Maybank 2 Gold Cards (AMEX)
cb_notes:
Earn 5% Cash Back when you spend with your Maybank 2 American Express Card during weekends in local and overseas; excluding transactions for utilities.
Cash Back is capped at RM50 per Principal Cardmember per calendar month.

title: Maybank Islamic PETRONAS Ikhwan Visa Platinum Card-i
cbcb_name: Maybank Islamic PETRONAS Ikhwan Visa Platinum Card-i
cb_notes:
The Cash Back is to be rewarded based on Cardmembers’ retail purchases at PETRONAS stations using Maybank Islamic PETRONAS Ikhwan Visa Card-i with the following criteria (“Eligible Spend”):
(a) 8% Cash Back for retail purchases at PETRONAS stations performed from Saturday; 00:00 to Sunday; 23:59; herein refers as (“Weekend”);
(b) 1% Cash Back for retail purchases at PETRONAS stations performed from Monday; 00:00 to Friday; 23:59; herein refers as (“Weekday”)
Cash Back is capped at maximum RM 50 per Cardmember account per calendar month.

title: Maybank Islamic PETRONAS Ikhwan Visa Gold Card-i

Cash Back is capped at maximum RM 50 per Cardmember account per calendar month.

title: Maybank Islamic Ikhwan Mastercard Platinum Card-i
cbcb_name: Maybank Islamic Ikhwan Mastercard Platinum Card-i
cb_notes:
The Cash Back is to be rewarded based on 5% of Cardmember’s retail spending on Petrol and Groceries on Friday and Saturday only.
Spend on Government Bodies, utilities, e-wallets reloads and other petrol brand other than Petronas are not taken into account in the accumulation of Cash Back (“Eligible Spend”). Cash Back is capped at maximum RM 50 per Cardmember account per calendar month.

cb_notes: 5% Cashback for all petrol & groceries (domestic only) everyday, capped at RM88 per month.

Petrol, insurance, recurring payments and government transactions excluded.

title: PB Visa Signature Credit Card

title: PB Visa Infinite Credit Card
cb_notes: 1% Unlimited Cash MegaBonus for overseas retail purchases. 0.3% Unlimited Cash MegaBonus for local retail purchases. 5x complimentary global access to participating Plaza Premium Lounge worldwide with minimum accumulative retail transactions of RM1,000 within 30 calendar days before and/or after each lounge access.

title: PB Quantum Mastercard
cb_notes: 2% Cash Back on overseas transactions with minimum RM100 per transaction, capped at RM20 per monthly statement cycle (Cash Back payout is combined between Principal and Supplementary accounts).

title: PB Quantum Visa Card

title: Standard Chartered Simply Cash credit card
cbcb_name: Standard Chartered Simply Cash credit card
cb_notes: 15% cashback on petrol (cap at RM20), grocery plus dining spends (cap at RM20) at selected merchants if the monthly retail spend is at least RM2,500. 0.5% cash back for petrol and grocery plus dining (cap at total of RM10) if the monthly retail spend is below RM2,500.

title: UOB One Platinum Card
cb_notes: 10% Petrol, Groceries, Dining and GRAB services (capped RM15/month) require RM1,500 minimum total monthly spend. No cashback on utilities, Liberty insurance, Top up transactions except for GrabPay, government, JomPay, FPX.

title: UOB EVOL Card
cb_annual_fee_waiver: Waived if the card is used at least once a month for consecutive 12 months
cb_notes: 10% online (capped RM15/month) and 5% eWallet top-ups (capped RM15/month) require RM1,000 minimum total monthly spend. Online excludes eWallet and POS transactions. eWallet = MCC 6540 top-ups only. No cashback on utilities, transport, insurance, telecoms, government, JomPay, FPX.

title: HSBC Amanah MPower Platinum Credit Card-i
cbcb_name: HSBC Amanah MPower Platinum Credit Card-i
cb_notes: 8% on eWallet, groceries and petrol with RM2,000+ monthly spend (capped RM15/month each). 1% at <RM2,000. Base rate 0.2% domestic — unlimited with no minimum spend. Calculator shows maximum tier rates based on your total spend.

title: HSBC Live+ Credit Card
cb_notes: 5% on dining, shopping and entertainment with RM5,000+ monthly spend (capped RM30/month each). 2% at RM2,500+, 1% at RM1,000+. Base rate 0.2% domestic and 0.5% overseas — both unlimited with no minimum spend. Calculator shows maximum tier rates based on your total spend.

title: HLB Wise Card
cb_notes: 15% dining on weekends (capped RM20/month), 0.5% weekdays. 10% groceries, pharmacy and petrol on weekends (capped RM15/month each), 0.5% weekdays. 1% online (capped RM15/month). All above require RM1,000 minimum total monthly spend. Below RM1,000: all categories earn 0.2% capped RM2/month each. Other eligible spend (including overseas) earns 0.2% below RM1,000 or 0.02% above — both unlimited. Calculator uses weekend rates for maximum cashback estimate.

title: HLB Essential Card
cb_notes: Shopping (clothing/dept stores) and travel (airlines/hotels/agencies) earn 0.5% below RM3,000 total spend, 1% above. Insurance 0.5% unlimited. All other categories 0.2% unlimited. Excludes Government, JomPay, FPX, QR Pay via HLB Connect App.

title: CIMB PETRONAS Visa Infinite-i Credit Card
cbcb_name: CIMB PETRONAS Visa Infinite-i Credit Card
cb_notes: Petronas/Setel/EV charging: 12% if statement balance ≥ RM4,000, 6% if ≥ RM1,500, capped RM60/cycle. Dining, groceries and cashless parking: 6% if balance ≥ RM4,000, 3% if ≥ RM1,500, capped RM60/cycle. Unlimited 1% Cash Rebate on Overseas Spend: 1% Cash Rebate for statement balance RM1,500 and above. Statement balance includes carried-forward balance plus current month transactions. Calculator uses higher tier rates — actual cashback depends on your statement balance.

title: CIMB PETRONAS Visa Platinum-i Credit Card
cbcb_name: CIMB PETRONAS Visa Platinum-i Credit Card
cb_notes: Petronas/Setel/EV charging: 8% if statement balance ≥ RM2,000, 4% if ≥ RM500, capped RM50/cycle. Dining, groceries and cashless parking: 2% if balance ≥ RM2,000, 1% if ≥ RM500, capped RM50/cycle. Statement balance includes carried-forward balance plus current month transactions. Calculator uses higher tier rates — actual cashback depends on your statement balance.

title: CIMB Cash Rebate Platinum Credit Card
cbcb_name: CIMB Cash Rebate Platinum Credit Card
cb_notes:
For ‘Groceries, Petrol, Cinema, Mobile and Utility Bill Payments’, 5% Cash Rebate for statement balance RM 3,000 and above. 2% Cash Rebate for statement balance below RM 3,000.
Statement Balance includes any outstanding balances which are carried forward from the previous month’s statement and new transactions made on the current month’s statement.

title: BSN Visa Cash Back Credit Card
cbcb_name: BSN Visa Cash Back Credit Card
cb_notes:
Cash Back is capped at RM15 per category per month for groceries, dining and petrol (capped at maximum RM45 per Cardholder per month) with the following tiers
Tier 1: 0.2% on Groceries, Dining and Petrol if the total monthly spend amount is less than RM 1,000
Tier 2: 1.0% on Groceries, Dining and Petrol if the total monthly spend amount is from RM 1,000 to RM 2,999.99
Tier 2: 5.0% on Groceries, Dining and Petrol if the total monthly spend amount is at least RM 3,000. Cash Back earned for other retail 0.2% and overseas spend 1.0% is unlimited with no monthly cap.

title: Bank Rakyat Xclusive Explorer Credit Card-i
